privileged_info_summary: The task uses real data from the UCI Machine Learning Repository's Cleveland Heart Disease dataset, containing 303 patient records with clinical measurements. The dataset has 14 attributes including age, cholesterol, resting blood pressure, and heart disease status (0-4). Ground truth counts verified: 164 patients with no disease (value 0) and 139 with disease (values 1-4). The dataset is publicly available and well-documented, used extensively in epidemiological and machine learning research. All claimed ground truth counts (total_records=303, disease_no=164, disease_yes=139) are verified correct. The dataset source URL is accessible and functional.
